app.name: Women and Girls Ministry Coordination Platform

mifem.brandName: Women and Girls Ministry Coordination Platform

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome back, {{name}}. Here is what is happening in your mission field.

attendance.title: Attendance tracking
attendance.subtitle: Digital check-in, QR sessions, participation analytics, and exports.
attendance.qrHint: Scan with a smartphone to open the check-in flow (demo).

communication.title: Communication center
communication.subtitle: Announcements, bulletin board, messaging, SMS templates, and notifications.
communication.uploadPlaceholder: Attach PDF, Image, or Excel Files
communication.noAnnouncements: No announcements found in your hierarchy.
communication.subject: Subject
communication.smsHint: Integrate with your SMS gateway. This screen captures audience, template, and preview.
communication.editorBodyPlaceholder: Write announcement body here. Use markdown buttons above to format...

reports.title: Reports & analytics
reports.subtitle: KPIs, ministry statistics, participation trends, and exports.

achievements.title: Achievements & stories
achievements.subtitle: Milestones, galleries, testimonials, and ministry news.

leader.title: Submit Achievement
leader.approvalNotice: Submissions require admin approval before being published.

ach1.title: 5,000 baptisms recorded since 2020
ach1.summary: The union celebrates faithful public evangelism and discipleship.
ach1.author: Communication Office

ach2.title: Youth Camp 2026 - Moments of faith
ach2.summary: Highlights from worship, outreach, and fellowship.
ach2.author: Youth Department

ach3.title: "He restored my family" - Alice M.
ach3.summary: A member from Rubavu shares how prayer meeting changed their home.
ach3.author: Publishing

ach4.title: New church planted in Eastern Field
ach4.summary: Small groups and health ministry opened doors in the community.
ach4.author: Mission Desk

ach5.title: Youth outreach in Northern Zone
ach5.summary: Submitted for approval - awaiting admin review.
ach5.author: Zone Coordinator

admin.title: User management & RBAC
admin.subtitle: Create users, assign roles, tune permissions, and review security activity.
admin.resetHint: Trigger sends a secure reset link (simulated in this demo).
admin.bulkRegistrationDesc: Allow other leader roles to access the Excel import file upload feature from their respective dashboards.
admin.searchPlaceholder: Filter users by name or email...
admin.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{name}}? This action is logged and cannot be undone.
admin.resetPasswordDesc: You are resetting the password for {{name}}. The user will be forced to change this temporary password on their next sign-in.
admin.resetPasswordComplete: Provide this password to the user. The system will prompt them for password update immediately upon access.
admin.excelDropPrompt: Select or drag Excel sheet (.csv or .xlsx)
admin.excelMaxSizeHint: Max size 2MB. Columns: name, email, role (optional)
admin.bulkSuccessDesc: {{count}} user profiles created and registered. All accounts have been flagged for forced password updates.
admin.formatError: Unsupported file format. Please attach a valid .csv or .xlsx Excel file.
admin.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Excel file size must be less than 2MB.
admin.noDataRows: Excel file has no data rows.
admin.missingColumns: Could not locate "name" or "email" columns in headers. Please check Excel formatting.

home.heroSubtitle: A centralized digital platform for managing church membership, events, attendance, and reports across the Rwanda Union Mission.
home.footer: © {{year}} Women and Girls Ministry Coordination Platform — Rwanda Union Mission (SDA). All rights reserved.

auth.staffCheckboxErrorStaff: Staff/Leader access requires the checkbox to be checked. Please tick the "I am a Staff/Leader" box to continue.
auth.staffCheckboxErrorMember: Your account is a regular member account. Please uncheck the "I am a Staff/Leader" box.
auth.passwordMinChars: Password must be at least {{count}} characters
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
auth.forgotCheckEmailMessage: We've sent a password reset link to your email address. Please check your inbox.
auth.resetSubtitle: Set a new secure password for your account
auth.otpSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email
auth.forcePasswordSubtitle: You are logging in with a temporary password. For security reasons, you must update your password before accessing the system.
auth.forcePasswordErrorFailed: Failed to update password. Please try again.
auth.sessionExpiredSubtitle: Your session has timed out due to inactivity. Please sign in again to continue managing your portal.
auth.sessionExpiredFooter: Women and Girls Ministry Coordination Platform • Rwanda Union Mission
auth.unauthorizedSubtitle: You do not have the necessary permissions to view this page. Please contact your system administrator if you believe this is an error.

validation.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 2 characters
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

settings.subtitle: Configure preferences, display style, language, notifications, and active sessions.

settings.logoDesc: Upload a custom logo image for the system

settings.emailAlertsDesc: Receive report deadlines and status updates via email
settings.smsAlertsDesc: Get urgent system alerts sent to your phone number
settings.weeklyDigestDesc: A summarized progress report of local field analytics
settings.mfaDesc: Add an extra layer of security using an authenticator app
settings.highContrastDesc: Increases visibility of borders and labels for readability
settings.largeFontsDesc: Enlarges primary text for easy screen navigation
